title: Install aggregate paths
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Install aggregate paths demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and prepare for installation

pcs.text: Read work instructions relating to installation of aggregate path and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Read work instructions relating to installation of aggregate path and confirm with supervisor?

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.
